# PostClaw

> PostClaw is a SaaS that gives you a personal AI content manager on Telegram. Create, adapt, and publish social media posts across 13+ social platforms — just by chatting.

## What PostClaw Does

PostClaw provides each user with their own private AI bot on Telegram, powered by OpenClaw (the open-source AI agent framework with 140K+ GitHub stars). Chat with your bot to draft posts, adapt content for different platforms, and publish — all from one conversation. Each user gets an isolated bot instance with their own social accounts connected.

## Key Features

- Personal AI bot on Telegram that creates and publishes social media content
- Publish to 13+ social platforms from one chat (Instagram, TikTok, X/Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, YouTube, Pinterest, Threads, Bluesky, Reddit, Telegram, Discord, Mastodon)
- AI-adapted content per platform (tone, length, hashtags, format)
- Media support (images and videos via Cloudinary)
- Private, isolated bot instance per user
- Unlimited posts, cancel anytime

## How It Works

1. Sign up and subscribe ($29/month)
2. Connect your social media accounts from the dashboard
3. Open Telegram and start chatting with your personal AI bot
4. Tell it what to post — it writes, adapts, and publishes across all your platforms

## Target Audience

- Content creators who publish across multiple platforms
- Founders and indie hackers managing their own social presence
- Small businesses wanting consistent social media without hiring a manager
- Professionals who want to stay active on social media without the overhead

## Pricing

- $29/month — single plan, everything included
- Unlimited posts across all connected platforms
- 7-day money-back guarantee
- Cancel anytime, no contracts

## Tech Stack

- AI Agent: OpenClaw (open-source)
- LLM: Kimi K2.5 by Moonshot
- Messaging: Telegram Bot API
- Social Media API: Late API (getlate.dev)
- Hosting: Fly.io (isolated container per user)

- [Homepage](https://www.postclaw.io): Main landing page with product overview, demo, and pricing
